description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle, resembling a main battle tank, with a large, centrally mounted turret and a long, prominent cannon extending from the front. The hull is low and wide, with sloped armor plating covering the front, sides, and turret for enhanced protection. The vehicle features six large road wheels on each side, connected by a continuous metal track system, providing superior off-road mobility. The exterior is finished in a dark, multi-tone camouflage pattern, blending shades of green, brown, and black, with visible weathering and wear. Additional features include a commander's cupola, hatches, and various external storage compartments and equipment mounts. No visible military insignia or unit markings are present on the hull or turret.
description: A heavily armored tracked tank with a large turret, long cannon, and multi-tone camouflage. It features sloped armor, six road wheels per side, and no visible military markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped glacis plate, the main cannon centered, and the heavy armor on the lower hull.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, six large road wheels, and the continuous track system.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the turret, engine deck, and rear armor, with exhaust and storage details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the turret profile, cannon, and track system.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret front; possible secondary mount on the turret roof, but no other mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; reinforced front glacis and turret face; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Multi-tone camouflage with irregular patches of dark green, black, and brown in a blended, non-digital style.
